title: The Super Chef Contest
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Trap cheats in the Super Chef Contest, but when his freezer fails Geronimo must cook honestly to win the Golden Fork! 🍳

q.en: Who asks Geronimo to be his assistant in the Super Chef Contest?
q.zh: 谁请杰罗尼摩做自己的助手参加超级大厨争霸赛？

explain.en: Trap begs Geronimo to be his taster and assistant so he can enter the Super Chef Contest in Gourmetville.
explain.zh: 特拉普求杰罗尼摩当自己的试吃员兼助手，好让他去美食村参加超级大厨争霸赛。

q.en: Where is the Super Chef Contest held?
q.zh: 超级大厨争霸赛在哪里举行？

options.en: Count Ludwig von Cheddar's castle in Gourmetville
options.zh: 美食村里路德维希·冯·切达伯爵的城堡
新老鼠城的市中心广场

explain.en: The contest takes place every year in Count Ludwig von Cheddar's ancient castle in Gourmetville, in the Cheese and Honey region.
explain.zh: 比赛每年在美食村、奶酪与蜂蜜地区的路德维希·冯·切达伯爵古城堡里举行。

q.en: What prize does the winner of the contest receive?
q.zh: 比赛的获胜者能得到什么奖品？

explain.en: The winner receives the Great Golden Fork Trophy and is named Mouse Island's Super Chef of the Year.
explain.zh: 获胜者会得到伟大的黄金叉子奖杯，并被封为老鼠岛年度超级大厨。

q.en: How long does the Super Chef Contest last?
q.zh: 超级大厨争霸赛持续多久？

explain.en: The contest lasts seven days: the first six are elimination rounds, and the seventh is the final with the top seven chefs.
explain.zh: 比赛持续七天，前六天是淘汰赛，第七天是七强决赛。

q.en: Which judge is the famous celebrity chef known for being very hard to please?
q.zh: 哪位评委是出了名难伺候的明星大厨？

explain.en: Gordon Ratsey is the most famous celebrity chef on Mouse Island and is known for being very, very hard to please.
explain.zh: 戈登·拉特西是老鼠岛最有名的明星大厨，以极其挑剔、难以取悦而闻名。

q.en: What was really inside Trap's mysterious red metal trunk?
q.zh: 特拉普那个神秘的红色金属箱里到底装了什么？

options.en: A portable freezer with Aunt Sweetfur's dishes
options.zh: 一台便携冰箱，里面是甜芙阿姨做的菜
从国外带回的稀有香料

explain.en: The trunk was a portable freezer. Aunt Sweetfur had cooked the dishes, and Trap kept them frozen until each contest round.
explain.zh: 那个箱子其实是一台便携冰箱。甜芙阿姨把菜做好，特拉普把它们冷冻起来，等到每轮比赛再拿出来。

q.en: What caused Trap's frozen food to spoil before the final?
q.zh: 决赛前，特拉普冷冻的食物为什么会坏掉？

options.en: A thunderstorm cut the castle's power, so the freezer shut off
options.zh: 一场雷暴切断了城堡的电力，冰箱停了
杰罗尼摩不小心打开了它

explain.en: The storm the night before caused a power outage, the freezer turned off, and all the food went bad and attracted flies.
explain.zh: 前一晚的暴风雨导致停电，冰箱停止运转，所有食物都坏了，还招来了苍蝇。

q.en: What injury did Trap get when he slipped in the spoiled food?
q.zh: 特拉普滑倒在坏掉的食物上时，受了什么伤？

options.en: He dislocated a kneecap, broke his other knee, and sprained a paw
options.zh: 他膝盖骨脱臼、另一条腿膝盖骨折，还扭了爪子

options.en: He only got a small cut on his ear
options.zh: 他只是耳朵上划了个小口子

explain.en: The doctor confirmed Trap dislocated his kneecap, broke his other knee, and sprained a paw, so he left on a stretcher.
explain.zh: 医生确认特拉普膝盖骨脱臼、另一条腿膝盖骨折，还扭了爪子，只好被担架抬走。

q.en: Where did Geronimo get the fresh ingredients for his dishes?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的新鲜食材是从哪里弄来的？

explain.en: When the town stores were closed, Aunt Mousie let Geronimo gather vegetables, fruit, milk, eggs, and fresh mozzarella from her farm.
explain.zh: 镇上商店都关门了，老鼠阿姨让杰罗尼摩从她的农场采集蔬菜、水果、牛奶、鸡蛋和新鲜马苏里拉奶酪。

q.en: What two dishes did Geronimo cook for the final round?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在决赛中做了哪两道菜？

options.en: Mousetastic Zucchini Pizza and Fabumouse Fruit Salad with Cream
options.zh: 超棒西葫芦披萨和绝妙奶油水果沙拉

options.en: Fried snail pie and oyster sauce
Liver meatballs and wild onion cake
Chocolate dumplings and goat cheese tart
options.zh: 巧克力饺子和山羊奶酪挞

explain.en: Geronimo decided to cook his favorite dishes: Mousetastic Zucchini Pizza and Fabumouse Fruit Salad with Cream.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩决定做自己最拿手的两道菜：超棒西葫芦披萨和绝妙奶油水果沙拉。
